underlying_goal: Debug why interpret/WebSocket functionality isn't working on staging review apps and fix it
friction_detail: Claude initially investigated job queue config as the issue when the real problem was WebSocket connectivity broken by h2c switch; also included unwanted commits in PR.
brief_summary: User needed to fix broken WebSockets on staging review apps; Claude traced it to an h2c protocol switch that broke WebSocket upgrades and created a PR to revert to http1.
